features.title: Document inline body normalization
features.description: Support inline ADR and SPEC body text in ssot-core document mutations while preserving canonical persisted document shape.

features.description: Track the workspace artifact inventory for CLI surfaces, schemas, and packaged document inventories as its own feature.

features.title: Migration entity id max-length rollout
features.description: Keep migration coverage and checked-in schema mirrors aligned with the tightened entity-id length contract.

features.description: Track `adr.schema.json` as its own governed schema feature.

features.title: Schema boundary.snapshot.schema.json
features.description: Track `boundary.snapshot.schema.json` as its own governed schema feature.

features.title: Schema certification.report.schema.json
features.description: Track `certification.report.schema.json` as its own governed schema feature.

features.title: Schema entity id max lengths
features.description: Add a shared maximum normalized-id length across runtime validators and shipped schemas.

features.description: Track `graph.export.schema.json` as its own governed schema feature.

features.title: Schema published.snapshot.schema.json

features.title: Workspace package-dependency DAG
features.description: Track the governed workspace package-dependency DAG as its own feature.

features.title: Schema SPEC adr_ids
features.description: Track the schema-level addition of typed ADR ids on SPEC rows and authored SPEC payloads.

features.title: API SPEC ADR linking
features.description: Track document runtime validation, reference handling, and authored payload persistence for SPEC ADR links.

features.title: CLI flag --adr-ids
features.description: Track the typed CLI flag surface for setting SPEC ADR ids on create, update, link, and unlink commands.

features.title: Migration SPEC adr_ids rollout
features.description: Track upgrade behavior that adds adr_ids defaults and rewrites authored SPEC payloads for the new schema version.

features.title: Graph SPEC ADR visibility
features.description: Track graph and export visibility for explicit SPEC to ADR edges and derived feature to ADR edges.
